title: Software Engineer
description:
*Nordnet redefined the financial world as the first digital bank in Europe. Now we are about to do it again and the aim is to create the next generation of bank, in the cloud. We know that this requires great people, great teams, and great technology. Do you want to join us and build the new Nordnet?*
**In brief**
 At Nordnet we want to democratize savings and investments by giving our customers access to the best tools and information whether you are a professional investor or a small saver. With modern technologies and speed of delivery, we are building the next generation investment platform.
   

  

**This is part of the role**
 Nordnet is a company with tech as the primary focus. In our agile and autonomous teams, you will be working with engaged colleagues that love to share their knowledge. As a developer at Nordnet, you will have the possibility to make an impact and create value for our customers with continuous releases several times a day.
   

  

**This is you**
 To succeed in this role, we believe that you take great pride in your work, are curious and continuously want to learn and grow. Collaboration and discussing ideas and concepts with your colleagues are things you enjoy and believe are important in order to build great products.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We are looking for both
 **Backend** 
 and
 **Fullstack Software Engineers** 
 . You are a team player who automates everything – especially testing – and thrives in a DevOps-culture.
   

  

**Key Requirements**
* Core Tech: Modern Java (17+), Spring Boot, and Cloud development.
* Fullstack-track: Experience in React, TypeScript, and Node.js.
* DevOps: Interest in Infrastructure as Code and CI/CD.
* Mindset: You enjoy designing, deploying, and running your own services.


*Bonus: Experience with high-performing/low-latency systems or a personal interest in investments.*
**Nordnetters**
* Are proud of the friendly and humble environment
* Believe that the best code is written together and therefore appreciate pair/mob programming
* Continuously improve to ensure quality, making the code better with every release
* Commit to goals as a team, sharing the responsibility, success and failure


**What We Offer**
* Backend agile team which owns and maintains their product
* Your expertise and contribution will be appreciated from day one
* Plenty of opportunities to grow as an engineer
* Competitive salary and compensation


 We offer you the opportunity to work in a Nordic environment with a strong focus on delivery, product development and technology. Our ambitions are high and you will embark on a fast and challenging journey together with a skillful team of sharp and committed colleagues. Our teams are autonomous and embrace the agile way of working.
   

  

 Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We’re proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.
   

  

 We are over 900 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki and Copenhagen.
   

  

 Visit us on: www.nordnetab.com and https://career.nordnetab.com/pages/engineering
   

  

**Questions & applications**
 Apply today – Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 We want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as a part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
**Looking for a workplace for the future?**
 At Telenor, you own your career. Here, you’ll have the opportunity to make the most of your dreams and expertise while contributing to technological innovations that are barely even imagined today. Innovations that we know will change the map for how we communicate and live our connected lives in the future. Are you looking for a workplace where you can make a difference in what matters most – relationships between people.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 As a Full Stack Developer at Telenor in team Online Sales, you will play a key role in building and enhancing our consumer-facing products. You’ll work across the frontend and backend to deliver seamless solutions, collaborating with other cross-functional teams to support our sales channels. Beyond development, you’ll take ownership of deployment and operations with a strong DevOps mindset—ensuring our applications are accessible, high-performing, and built to the highest quality standards.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Build reusable code and libraries with high quality
* Performance optimization and accessibility compliance


**Who You Are**
 You are an experienced software developer with a deep understanding of custom-built applications and strong expertise in Front-end, headless CMS. Preferably also with experience in .Net and Cloud native solutions.
   

  

**Behaviors**
 You are proactive and take ownership of your work, always looking for ways to improve solutions and optimize performance. You lead by example, ensuring best practices and high standards across the team. You follow through on commitments, fostering reliability and trust. Above all, you act with integrity and respect, creating a culture of collaboration and transparency.
   

  

 Hard Skills
   

  

* Preferable knowledge of modern frontend frameworks (e.g., Vue3 or similar)
* Extensive experience with .NET and .NET Core, strong proficiency in C#
* Experience working with headless CMS platforms (e.g., Contentful or similar)
* Understanding of RESTful APIs and microservices architecture
* Strong understanding of design patterns and best practices in software architecture
* Experience with cloud platforms (preferably AWS) and DevOps practices and tooling. Proficiency in database design, caching strategies, and performance tuning
* Strong security mindset, with knowledge of authentication, authorization, and data protection best practices


 Soft Skills
   

  

* Critical thinker and problem solver, able to navigate trade-offs between short-term deliverables and long-term system health
* Strong communication skills, capable of explaining complex problems to developers, architects, and business stakeholders
* Self-motivated and adaptable, embracing change and fostering continuous learning within the team


**Our promise to you**
*We are better together.*
 Here, you’ll be part of a collaborative and inclusive culture, built on strong shared values and leadership that empowers you with both trust and confidence. We believe in enabling each other to act and make decisions, while always having each other’s backs through ups and downs.
   

  

*We support relationships and societies.*
 Telenor plays a vital role in the society, giving your work a greater purpose. Every day, we create value for millions of people and maintain a customer-first approach where human relationships are at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

*We make room for life.*
 Work from home up to two days a week, if your role allows it. The rest of the time, we create magic together at the office. Leadership based on trust and flexible working hours helps you balance work and life. We support you through every stage of life with our benefit package, including collective agreements, occupational pensions, wellness allowances, and customized insurance solutions tailored to your needs.
   

  

*We invite you to a career in motion.*
 Your development is at the center of our culture. We dedicate at least 40 hours per year for you to deepen your expertise, explore new areas, and develop in your role. Through Telenor Academy and other learning initiatives, you’ll have the tools and freedom to advance your career. When you want to broaden your horizons, we are present throughout the Nordics.
   

  

**Apply today!**
 Will you take the next step in your career with us? We look forward to your application! We review applicants on an ongoing basis, so don’t wait—reach out today. For questions, reach out to Agile Team Lead Thomas Berglund at thomas.berglund@telenor.se. We do not accept applications via email.
   

  

**Good to know**
 As part of Telenor’s policy, we conduct background checks on final candidates for all recruitments.

title: React Developer
description:
**React Developer** 




  





 We are looking for a highly skilled and hands-on React Developer with strong experience in building scalable, production-grade web applications. The ideal candidate should have deep expertise in modern React, strong problem-solving abilities, and experience working in complex, real-world projects.
 



  





 This is a purely front-end role focused on React development and you will need to:
 



  




* Develop and maintain complex web applications using React.js
* Build reusable, scalable, and maintainable components
* Implement state management using Redux / Zustand / Context API
* Optimize application performance and ensure responsiveness
* Integrate REST APIs and handle asynchronous data flows
* Write clean, testable, and well-documented code
* Participate in code reviews and enforce best practices Debug production issues and provide quick resolutions
* Collaborate closely with UI/UX designers, backend developers, and product teams



  





**Essential skills:** 




  




* 5+ years of overall frontend experience
* 4+ years of hands-on experience in React.js Strong understanding of: React Hooks Functional components Component lifecycle Context API Performance optimization techniques Experience with state management (Redux / Zustand / Recoil)
* Strong JavaScript fundamentals (ES6+ concepts) Experience with TypeScript Experience with REST API integration
* Strong understanding of component architecture and code modularization Experience with unit testing (Jest / React Testing Library) Solid understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design
* Experience with TanStack Query Experience with CI/CD pipelines Knowledge of basic performance profiling tools Exposure to cloud deployment environments

title: Fullstack developer Neo | SEB, Solna
description:
Ready to drive innovation and customer value? Join our team and contribute to both exciting new feature development and the ongoing maintenance of our mobile youth and family offering, building high-traffic applications with Node.js and cutting-edge cloud platforms, shaping the future in a collaborative, welcoming environment.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fuelled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we’re innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you’ll be interested in this opportunity!
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Fullstack Developer, working with SEB Neo and the family experience, you’ll drive customer value with a strong sense of ownership and quality. You’ll develop high-traffic applications using Node.js TDD, and apply Infrastructure as Code with GCP/Kubernetes/Terraform, managing CI/CD pipelines. This includes ensuring reliability, performance tuning, and robust security through monitoring, logging, alerting, and precise access control. You will design system architectures, making long-term technical decisions while balancing speed, quality, and scalability. Experience with native app development, React Native, Kotlin backends, or server-side rendering is a plus
   

  

**To Thrive In This Role, We Believe You Have**
* Solid experience developing applications with Node.js and practical experience with Test-Driven Development (TDD).
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code practices (Kubernetes, Terraform) and experience with GCP or other major cloud platforms (AWS, Azure).
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated deployments, understanding monitoring, logging, alerting, and security best practices.
* A strong sense of ownership and a focus on delivering customer value while balancing trade-offs between speed, quality, and scalability.
* Experience designing system architectures, making long-term technical decisions, and building high-traffic consumer applications/services.


**What We Offer**
* Agile and modern ways of working
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Mobility within a large global company
* Long-term stability


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from. Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-03-09. If you have questions about the position, please contact David Östberg, david.ostberg@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career https://bit.ly/SEBcareer
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which is why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
Are you a ready to use your skills for something that truly matters? Maybe you’ve built countless apps, optimized endless user flows, or maintained systems that never quite made a difference in people’s lives. Now, imagine putting your skills to work for something bigger - something that actually changes how healthcare, social services, and elderly care work together in Sweden.
   

  

 We’re building a next-generation platform that will transform collaboration across these vital sectors. We are now looking for experienced Fullstack Developers, who are ready to use their craft to make a real impact.
   

  

**Why Join Us?**
* Meaningful mission: Directly influence the future of Swedish healthcare and social services.
* Technical Leadership: Take ownership of architecture, drive technical decisions, and mentor colleagues.
* Modern tech & AI: Work with React, TypeScript, Java, Spring Boot, Docker, Kubernetes and AI-driven development.
* Growth & collaboration: Learn from talented colleagues and have access to mentorship and growth opportunities.
* Flexible culture: Enjoy flexible working conditions and a friendly culture built on trust and care.


**The position**
 You’ll be part of an agile and innovative team, contributing throughout the entire development lifecycle — from requirements to production-ready services. Depending on your experience, you’ll either grow into the role or take a lead in driving development and mentoring others.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Develop and maintain a modern, API-first platform using test-driven and AI-assisted methods.
* Mentor and support other developers, fostering a culture of technical excellence.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams (designers, product owners, domain experts) to deliver secure, scalable, and user-friendly solutions.
* Contribute to architectural decisions for scalability, performance, and security
* Stay at the forefront of technology and share your expertise with the team.


**About You**
 You are curious, eager to learn, and enjoy working with others. You thrive in an environment where you can grow your skills step by step, contribute with your ideas, and collaborate to solve problems together.
   

  

 At Cambio, we value initiative and personal growth. Our culture is built on Trust, Care, and Together values we believe are important to both our work and our people. It’s important to us that you recognize and identify with these values.
   

  

**Requirements**
* A passionate engineer with 5+ years of experience building great products using cutting-edge technologies
* Curiosity about AI and enthusiasm for exploring new technologies.
* Communicates fluently in Swedish and English


**It's a bonus**
* Experience working in our tech stack


**Additional Information**
**Place of employment** 
 : Linköping, Motala or Stockholm
   

  

**Scope** 
 : Full-time, hybrid work model (three days per week in-office)
   

  

**Form of employment** 
 : Permanent employment, 6 months trial period
   

  

 We review applications and conduct interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible via the link.
   

  

 Cambio Healthcare Systems is Sweden’s leading suppliers of healthcare information systems and a growing player in the European market with just over 100,000 users across general and university hospitals, specialist units and outpatient units. Through the use of our integrated solutions, our customers provide services to 4 million patients.

title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
description:
**About Northfork**
 Northfork is a B2B SaaS company that makes it easier than ever to shop online for groceries. Our technology enables leading retailers, recipe publishers, and brands to convert their recipes into curated ingredient lists that are in-stock in a preferred retailer near you. At the same time taking allergens, dietary restrictions, and personal preferences into account.
   

  

 We are now looking for a
 **Senior Fullstack Engineer with a frontend focus** 
 to join our team. You will play a central role in shaping the user-facing experience of our platform, while contributing meaningfully across the full stack. You’ll be part of a fast-paced expansion journey, working with a distributed team of highly skilled engineers.
   

  

**Expectations**
* Craft intuitive, high-performance, and maintainable user experiences
* Take ownership of frontend architecture and drive best practices in component structure, state management, performance, and testing. Frontend development will represent ~70% of your focus.
* Collaborate closely with product and design to translate complex requirements into elegant technical solutions
* Being able to contribute to backend architecture decisions, ensuring seamless integration across the stack
* Write clean, scalable, and sustainable code that balances product excellence with delivery speed
* We actively use AI tools (Claude Code, Coderabbit) in our workflow and expect engineers to use them responsibly to accelerate development while maintaining code quality.
* Proactively identify improvements in performance, security, and developer experience
* Support and elevate the team through knowledge sharing and thoughtful code reviews


**Qualifications**
* Demonstrated success building and shipping high-quality web applications in production environments
* Strong knowledge of modern JavaScript, TypeScript as a bonus
* Deep experience with React and modern frontend patterns (hooks, component architecture, state management, performance optimization)
* Experience designing clean, maintainable frontend architectures at scale
* Solid backend experience, preferably in PHP (Symfony), JavaScript (Express)
* Good understanding of RESTful APIs and backend integration patterns
* Familiarity with AWS and modern DevOps practices
* Experience working in cross-functional product teams
* Fluent in English


 This is a senior, but hands-on role. We value impact and ownership over years alone, but this position likely
 **requires minimum 8 years of professional experience** 
 , with several years spent owning frontend-heavy product development.
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

* Competitive salary
* Work with an international team
* Pension through collective agreement
* A fun, collaborative workplace
* Real influence over product and technical direction


 We have a hybrid setup, but spend two days a week together in our Stockholm office.

title: Product Developer - Womenswear
description:
**Job Description**
**WHAT YOU’LL DO**
 In this role as a Product Developer, you will play an important part in the exciting process of shaping the H&M Women assortment. You will define and execute both short- and long-term strategies for your category, ensuring alignment with our overall assortment goals. Leveraging your fashion intelligence, salesmanship, and commercial insight, you’ll drive seasonal keys and act on emerging trends. You will continuously refine our product and component strategy to drive growth and profitability.
   

  

 In this position you will drive initiatives forward, ensuring seamless execution and effective cross-team collaboration in a fast-paced environment. You will work alongside a talented team of a product manager, planner, designer, and pattern maker, as well as collaborating closely with the production team. With your strong passion for product and fashion, you will be essential in creating world-class products that are on-trend and resonate with our customers.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 Qualifications:
   

  

* 5+ years of experience from a similar role as Product Developer for garments, shoes or accessories
* Education in Textiles, Buying, or Product Development
* Proven track record in creating products for the womenswear customer with a great sense of fashion and impeccable taste
* A keen eye for current fashion trends with strong fashion intelligence
* A deep passion for products and product development
* Extensive material knowledge
* Driven, structured, and proactive in taking initiatives
* Salesmanship and results-oriented
* Excellent communication skills
* A strong team player with a flexible attitude
* Ability to identify opportunities, improvements, and efficient solutions


**Who We Are**
 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  

 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  

**JOIN US**
 Additional information:
   

  

 This is a full-time position, with placement in Stockholm. If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including
 **CV in English as soon as possible** 
 . Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.)  If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  

 Benefits:
   

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  

 Inclusion & Diversity:
   

  

 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  

 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  

**Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.**

title: Full Stack Developer with cloud | Stockholm
description:
Are you a
 **Full Stack Developer** 
 passionate about cutting-edge automotive technology? Do you thrive in a dynamic, innovative environment where your skills can make a real impact? If so, the team in Stockholm is looking for you!
 



  





 The ALTEN Sweden, Stockholm office is home to a dynamic, highly skilled team of engineers and developers from all over the world who specialize in delivering tailored solutions across sectors like automotive, telecommunications, life sciences, and IT. Known for their collaborative spirit, the team combines deep technical expertise with a proactive, problem-solving approach, fostering an environment where creativity and efficiency meet to drive impactful results for clients. With a strong focus on professional development and a supportive culture, the Stockholm team is dedicated to both individual growth and collective success, making it an exciting and empowering place to be a part of.
 



  





**WHAT WE OFFER YOU** 



* A supportive and inclusive workplace with a focus on personal and professional growth.
* Opportunities to expand your skill set with access to ALTEN’s global network of experts.
* Individual education budget.
* Work-life balance days: three extra days off per year.
* Collective agreement, Pension, insurances, and wellness grants.



  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 




 You will develop and implement full stack solutions using the .NET framework and modern front-end technologies, working on exciting, high-impact projects while collaborating closely with automotive engineers and product teams to deliver solutions that excel in performance, scalability, and safety. You will innovate and optimize software systems for advanced automotive applications such as infotainment systems, autonomous driving, and connected vehicles, taking part in the full development lifecycle from concept and design through testing, deployment, and continuous improvement. By sharing your expertise and staying ahead of the latest industry trends, you will contribute to a culture of excellence and drive the future of automotive software development.
 



  





 We are looking for a mid-senior level developer with at least 4 years of professional experience who is motivated, passionate about automotive technology, and has hands-on experience in full stack development.
 



  





 Skills and experience:
 


* A degree in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent experience.
* Strong experience with backend development with .NET or Java.
* Knowledge of front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js.
* Experience with clouds (AWS, Azure, or GCP), and CI/CD pipelines
* Meritorious: strong understanding of software architecture principles and best practices for writing high-quality code.



  





**ABOUT ALTEN** 




 ALTEN is one of Europe's largest engineering and IT consulting companies, with over 57,000 employees in approximately 30 countries. Our engineers carry out complex and highly technical projects throughout the product development chain for leading companies in a variety of industries, such as Automotive, Defense & Security, Energy, Industrial Equipment, Public Service, and Life Sciences. In Sweden, we have around 1,300 dedicated employees with nine offices in nine cities – from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north.
 



  





 For the fifth year in a row, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden's most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, an award for employers who offer unique career and development opportunities.
 



  





  





 Welcome to read more about us at alten.se

title: Senior Software Engineer - NCG purchase
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
  

  





 We are looking for a
 **Senior Software Engineer** 
 to help develop flexible and sustainable technology solutions for H&M. In this role, you will improve and optimize our Order System to ensure it supports our strategic goals and delivers efficient, user‑friendly functionality.
   

  





 Success requires strong communication, effective collaboration, and the ability to translate business needs into scalable, cost‑efficient solutions. You will work closely with stakeholders to understand their processes, clarify requirements, and identify opportunities to enhance the system.
   

  





 In addition to the above, your role will involve:
   

  




* Design, develop, and maintain high quality, scalable software solutions using C#/.NET.
* Build, implement, and manage CI/CD pipelines leveraging GitHub to enable reliable and efficient deployments.
* Collaborate closely with cross functional teams (product, design, QA, and business stakeholders) to define, design, and deliver new features.
* Ensure performance, quality, security, and responsiveness across applications.
* Identify performance bottlenecks, troubleshoot complex issues, and fix bugs to improve system stability.
* Maintain high standards for code quality, organization, testing, and automation.
* Design and build event driven integrations, enabling scalable communication between systems and services.
* Act as a Hands-on technical contributor, working closely with integration partners, platform providers, and the H&M Tech organization to deliver robust solutions.
* Identify opportunities to automate workflows using AI, and implement solutions that improve team efficiency, reduce manual effort, and enhance product quality.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH** 
  

  





 You will be part of the NCG (Non-commercial Goods) Order team within Corporate Support (Business Tech), working closely with business roles such as buyers, business developers and other stakeholders within Store implementation.
   

  





 The team is geographically distributed between Stockholm and India and oversees the entire order system for non-commercial goods (E.g. Store interior, alarm tags, packaging, lighting, printed material etc), ensuring efficiency, cost savings, and smooth operations.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE** 
  

  




* Bachelor's degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field.
* Approximately 8+ years of professional experience in software development.
* Strong proficiency in
 **C#** 
 and the
 **.NET framework** 
 .
* Solid hands on experience with
 **DevOps** 
 practices, including
 **CI/CD** 
 pipelines using GitHub.
* Proficiency in frontend development with React, enabling fullstack contribution. This would be beneficial but not mandatory.
* Strong understanding of software development principles, design patterns, and best engineering practices.
* Proven experience with eventdriven design.
* Strong expertise in building Azurebased middleware and integration solutions.
* Experience with
 **authentication and authorization** 
 , including
 **configuration and integration with UAM/IAM solutions** 
 .
* Strong problemsolving abilities, excellent attention to detail, and a commitment to highquality software delivery.
* Effective communicator with strong collaboration skills, able to work seamlessly in crossfunctional and distributed teams.
* Passionate, selfdriven team player who collaborates well with stakeholders across Sweden and India.



 Nice to Have
   

  




* Experience working with or building AIenabled solutions.
* Experience setting up observability, logging, and monitoring
* And people who are…
* Excellent in problem-solving with a strong attention to detail.
* Analytical thinkers with problem-solving skills to diagnose and resolve issues efficiently.
* Communicative and proactive in engaging with colleagues and stakeholders.
* Highly self-driven, with strong communication and coordination skills.
* Thriving in a fast-paced environment.



**WHO WE ARE** 
  

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values.Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**




 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* Staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online.
* Included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
* Collective Agreement and ITP pensions competitive to Swedish market.
* 30 days vacation, health care allowance and good work-life balance.
* Additional perks and discounts from Benify.



**JOIN US** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.

title: Frontend developer
description:
Remman Mobility Group is a strategic leader in the rapidly growing automotive remarketing industry. Backed by leading investors and offering competitive products, we're in an exciting growth phase. We believe our next stage of growth depends on the team we build, which is why we're looking for our next key contributor.
 





 To strengthen our product team, we're now looking for a skilled
 
**Frontend Developer** 

 . You'll be a core part of our development crew, architecting, building and scaling our products and features from initial concept to deployment. You'll own the user experience, transforming complex challenges into seamless interfaces for both our external applications and internal tools. Your expertise will be crucial in ensuring the integrity and quality of our codebase.
 




  





**What we’re looking for** 



* 5-7 years of experience building and shipping modern, high-quality frontend products
* Ability to make smart trade-offs between speed and polish, knowing when to ship and when to refine
* Strong product sense with an eye for UX details, accessibility and usability
* Deep expertise in our core tech stack
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks
* A collaborative and proactive mindset, with a knack for identifying and solving problems independently
* Since this is a hybrid position, it requires you to be based in Sweden and able to attend some meetings at our Stockholm office



  





**What you’ll do** 



* Engineer scalable solutions from the ground up, translating business requirements into robust, high-performance code
* Drive UX and functionality, actively shaping the product roadmap during the requirements-gathering phase
* Own the full DevOps lifecycle, from rigorous testing to seamless deployment, to ensure rock-solid quality and reliability
* Contribute to team synergy through daily stand-ups, sharing insights and strategizing to keep our sprints on track
* Provide mission-critical support for our live applications, troubleshooting issues and maintaining operational excellence



  





**Our tech stack** 



* Javascript/Typescript
* Vue
* Nuxt
* HTML/CSS
* Jest/Cypress
* Git
* Tailwind
* Vuetify



  





**What we offer** 





 A fast-growing company operating in an expanding market. We use a modern tech stack where you'll have a direct say in our technical direction and workflows. Our newly renovated office in Solna offers a modern and accessible workspace.
 




  





**We're looking forward to your application. Join us on our exciting journey!** 




  





**About Remman** 





 At Remman Mobility Group, our family of companies drives innovation and excellence across the automotive remarketing ecosystem. Our group has six companies and 120 colleagues across offices in Stockholm, Linköping, Örebro and Helsinki. Each entity is uniquely positioned to deliver specialized solutions, from cutting-edge remarketing platforms to flexible payment services and operational support. Together, we create a dynamic network that empowers OEMs, leasing companies, and dealerships to succeed in an ever-evolving industry.

title: Fullstack utvecklare Telenor
description:
Är du en nyfiken fullstack-utvecklare som vill jobba i en teknikdriven miljö och göra skillnad för hundratusentals aktiva användare? Vimla är mobiloperatören, som genom att vara en fristående del av Telenor, kombinerar kraften från en stor organisation med friheten och flexibiliteten i ett litet team. Vi står för att ta kundfokus, enkelhet och schyssthet till en ny nivå på mobilmarknaden och i vårt team. Vi vill att det ska vara enkelt och roligt att vara kund så väl som medarbetare hos oss!
   

  

 Nu har du chansen att joina teamet i rollen som Senior fullstack utvecklare, ta chansen och sök!
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra**
 I rollen som Senior Fullstack utvecklare på Vimla kommer du in i en scale-up miljö där du tillsammans med ditt team arbetar i syfte att utveckla och underhålla Vimlas tekniska miljö. Ni står i centrum för att bygga de tekniska förutsättningarna för en helt digital mobiloperatör. Du arbetar tillsammans med ett tight team av utvecklare med passion för teknik och bra stämning. Teamet består av såväl juniora som mer seniora kollegor, vilket medför en kultur av lärande och kunskapsdelning.
   

  

 Inom ramen för rollen kommer du
   

  

* Bygga och optimera våra API:er
* Förbättra vår CI/CD-pipeline
* Utveckla nya tjänster i vår digitala plattform
* Jobba med skalbarhet i vår molnbaserade miljö


 Hos oss får du möjlighet att utmanas, utveckla din kompetens och arbeta med fantastiska och kompetenta kollegor. Om du gillar att ha en möjlighet att påverka vad du jobbar med, en bredd i dina arbetsuppgifter och jobba i ett tight DevOps-team - det här är platsen för dig!
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
 Vi ser att du har minst tre års tidigare erfarenheter av utveckling inom Typescript, node backends samt react för frontend. Du har fokus på leverans och säkerställer alltid god kvalitet i slutresultatet och tror att du tidigare har erfarenhet från att designa, bygga och underhålla distribuerade system i en molnbaserad miljö (tex AWS). Vi förutsätter att du kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska.
   

  

 Tech-stack du jobbar med:
   

  

* Frontend: React, TypeScript, Redux, Jest, Playwright & React Native
* Backend: Node.js, API-utveckling
* Databas: PostgreSQL
* Arbetssätt: Agilt, DevOps, testdriven utveckling (TDD)


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Svelte
* Nginx, shell-scripting (Bash, Nushell)
* QA-arbete
* DevOps & Infrastruktur: Docker, Kubernetes/Docker Swarm, AWS, CI/CD med GitHub Actions


 På Vimla så värdesätter vi individer som är angelägna om att lära sig och utveckla sin egen kompetens. Vi förväntar oss inte att du känner till alla teknologier i vår stack, så vi letar främst efter någon med ett tillväxttänk och en vilja att lära sig!
   

  

**Varför du vill jobba på Vimla**
 Vimla är på en spännande tillväxtresa och möjligheterna att växa och utvecklas tillsammans med oss är enorma. Vi är ett roligt, tight team på runt 40 personer i en egen organisation som har stor frihet. Samtidigt är Vimla en del av Telenor Sverige och använder tryggheten som finns i ett stort bolag.
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar Vimla/Telenor med Experis IT, som har lång erfarenhet av att rekrytera IT-specialister och chefer.
   

  

 Om du har frågor eller vill ha mer information är du välkommen att kontakta rekryteringskonsulterna Anki Snis på
 **anki.snis@se.experis.com** 
 , +46 70-377 59 69, och Carina Eyoma på
 **carina.eyoma@se.experis.com** 
 , +46 73-086 22 75.
   

  

 Urval sker löpande, så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Vi ser fram emot att ta del av din ansökan!
   

  

 I enlighet med Telenors policy genomför vi en bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidater i alla rekryteringar.
   

  

 Plats: Stockholm Råsunda

title: Software Developer - Tieto Banktech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**Frontend-utvikler – Tieto Banktech**
 Vil du være med og utvikle fremtidens låneløsninger? Er du en nysgjerrig og engasjert frontendutvikler som ønsker å bli en del av et av de største teknologiselskapene i Norden? Da kan dette være rollen for deg!
   

  

 Vi ser etter en frontend-utvikler som ønsker å bli en del av Tieto Banktech. Med vår størrelse, ekspertise og spesialisering styrker vi finansinstitusjoner i deres arbeid med å øke smidigheten, effektiviteten og akselerere digital transformasjon.
   

  

**Når du blir en del av Tieto Banktech som frontend-utvikler:**
 Stillingen hører inn under forretningsenheten Loans som ligger fremst i Norden på automatisering av låneprosessen, og det har vi ambisjoner om å fortsette med. Gjennom stillingen vil du være en del av et team som leverer morgendagens bankløsninger.
   

  

 I din rolle som frontend-utvikler vil du inngå i kryss-funksjonelle team, der vi tilstreber å jobbe mest mulig agilt for å levere ny funksjonalitet raskt og med god kvalitet.
   

  

* Du blir en del av et kompetent tverrfaglig / teknisk team på tvers av lokasjoner og land
* Du vil utvikle robuste løsninger som du selv kan bruke i hverdagen
* Du vil delta i flere prosjekter og leveranser samtidig, noe som krever evne til samarbeid og prioritering


**Hvem ser vi etter?**
* Minimum 4 års erfaring med moderne Angular (signals, reactive patterns, TypeScript).
* Testing og kvalitet: Fordel om du har kjennskap til Vitest og Playwright
* DevOps: Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD-pipelines
* API-integrasjon: REST, OpenAPI
* Tilgjengelighet: Universell utforming
* Erfaring med designsystemer og komponentbiblioteker er sterkt ønsket
* Ytelsesoptimalisering og Web Workers
* Feature flags, og gjerne erfaring med performance monitoring
* Fordel om du har erfaring med banksystemer eller finansielle applikasjoner


**Som Person Tror Vi At Du**
* Er kvalitetsbevisst og har et sterkt ønske om å levere kode med høy kvalitet
* Samarbeider godt med UX/UI-designere og tverrfunksjonelle team
* Er en lagspiller som tar ansvar for å organisere arbeidet ditt og løse oppgavene dine
* Har gode kommunikasjonsevner – du vil både lære av og bidra til å utvikle kolleger
* Har interesse for å lære nye og innovative teknologier for å holde deg oppdatert på moderne frontend-teknologi – noe som er positivt både for deg og Tieto Banktech.


**Vi tilbyr:** 
 Vi tilbyr faglig utvikling, meningsfulle prosjekter, dyktige kolleger, en åpen og inkluderende kultur – og en svært god balanse mellom jobb og fritid! Du får muligheten til å være med på å forme fremtiden i en viktig og raskt voksende sektor. Vi tror også på nysgjerrighet og kontinuerlig læring – hvor man må avlære og lære nytt hver dag etter hvert som nye muligheter oppstår.
   

  

**Ble du inspirert?**
 Vi ser frem til å motta søknaden din!
   

  

 Intervjuer gjennomføres fortløpende, så vi oppfordrer deg til å søke allerede i dag.
   

  

**Lokasjon:** 
 Oslo, Trondheim eller Stockholm (Solna)
   

  

*Vi gjennomfører bakgrunnssjekk av alle aktuelle kandidater.
   

  

 Tieto takker nei til henvendelser fra rekrutteringsselskaper.*
 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Software Engineer II (Mid-Level) - JVM
description:
***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***








**Who We Are…**





 When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the
 *storytellers* 
 bringing our characters to life, the
 *creators* 
 bringing them to your living rooms and the
 *dreamers* 
 creating what’s next…
 









 From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.
 




  


 Warner Bros. has been entertaining audiences for more than 90 years through the world’s most-loved characters and franchises. Warner Bros. employs people all over the world in a wide variety of disciplines. We're always on the lookout for energetic, creative people to join our team.
 




  


**Your New Role...** 








 The Direct to Consumer (DTC) Group is a technology company within Warner Bros Discovery. We are building a global streaming video platform (OTT), and a suite of applications to support all of our network’s digital brands globally. We are building modern container-based micro-services operated on AWS. Our platform covers everything from search, browse, content catalog, merchandising, localizations, personalization, and much more. We enable performant streaming experiences across connected TVs, web, mobile phones, tablets, and consoles for a large footprint of WBD owned streaming services (HBO Max, Discovery+, CNN, and others). This is a growing, global engineering group crucial to WBD’s future. 
 







 We are hiring a Software Engineer II within the DTC Content Experience Platform. The team is responsible for aggregating, enabling, and serving the personalized Content Discovery experience within our DTC streaming video platforms through our Experience Services APIs. We ensure all client applications worldwide have seamless access to the latest and relevant content metadata, personalized browse experiences and curations, and presentational elements to deliver a best-in-class content discovery experience to our hundreds of millions of streaming users globally across our different streaming service platforms.
 



  


**Your Role Accountabilities...** 



* Design, implement, and maintain features or improvements in existing backend systems.
* Troubleshoot production issues—identify root causes, contribute to fixes, and help improve system resilience through learnings.
* Actively participate in technical discussions, design reviews, and planning sessions—bringing thoughtful questions and ideas to the table.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code, following team standards and contributing to code quality.
* Collaborate closely with teammates, product managers, and designers to understand requirements and deliver high-quality software.
* Contribute to improving development workflows, documentation, and internal tools to increase team productivity.
* Learn and apply best practices in system design, testing, observability, and deployment through hands-on experience and mentorship.



  


**Qualifications and Experience...** 



* Minimum 3 years hands-on experience developing backend services using Java or other JVM-based languages.
* Familiarity with building and running applications in cloud environments, using tools like Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS.
* Experience with distributed systems and microservice architectures
* Familiarity with sync and async communication patterns using technologies such as gRPC, Kafka, or similar technologies
* Demonstrated ability to design and deliver high-performance, low-latency APIs for real-time applications.
* Working knowledge of datastores and caching technologies such as PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, or Caffeine.
* Exposure to performance considerations, scalability challenges, and system observability in real-world applications.



  


**Additional Information...** 








 On December 5, Netflix and Warner Bros. Discovery announced they have entered into a definitive agreement under which Netflix will acquire Warner Bros., including its film and television studios, HBO Max and HBO. The transaction is expected to close after the separation of Warner Bros. Discovery's Global Networks division, Discovery Global, into a new publicly-traded company, which is expected to be completed in Q3 2026. For more details, including leadership appointments and information on individual brands, please visit our newsroom here.
 







 Although you will be hired by Warner Bros. Discovery, upon the planned spin-off of Discovery Global in 2026, your employment likely will transition to Warner Bros. During this period of transformation, you’ll have an exciting opportunity to lay the foundation at one of the world’s premier entertainment brands.
 



















  


**How We Get Things Done…**









 This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at
 












 www.wbd.com/guiding-principles/
 











  
 
 along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.
 








**Championing Inclusion at WBD**



 Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
 









 If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our
 
 accessibility page
 
 for instructions to submit your request.

title: Co-Founder CTO
description:
CTO & Co-Founder for Spucce Venture
   

  

 Some people work on products. Some people maintain systems. A few get to design the operating layer for an entire ecosystem.
   

  

 This is for the third kind.
   

  

 Spucce Venture is building a venture studio that creates companies at the intersection of human development and artificial intelligence. We are raising 10M SEK to build 10 ventures over the next two years. But before we build the portfolio, we build the engine.
   

  

 That engine is SVOS: Spucce Venture Operating System.
   

  

 We are looking for the technical co-founder who wants to build it.
   

  

 We are based in Stockholm/Greater Copenhagen area and assuming the amount of work needed for this adventure. Geographic location is vital. Please apply if you meet these criteria
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 You are not joining as an employee. You are stepping in as CTO and co-founder.
   

  

**Your Mission**
* Architect and build SVOS from v1 to full system
* Design the technical backbone for every venture we launch
* Think in systems, not features
* Turn vision into clean, scalable architecture
* Make AI work as infrastructure, not gimmick


 This is deep work. Real architecture. Long-term thinking.
   

  

**You Will Build**
* Identity and permission systems
* Persistent structured memory layers
* AI agent frameworks with controlled access
* Automation and orchestration logic
* Internal tools that allow small teams to operate like large organizations


 Every future venture will run on what you create.
   

  

 What We Are Looking For
   

  

 You are a full-stack developer with strong system design skills. You understand backend architecture, APIs, databases, cloud and security. You can integrate AI models and design agent workflows. If you do not know something, you learn it fast.
   

  

**But More Important**
 You think in leverage. You think in product. You think in business.
   

  

 You understand that architecture decisions affect cost structure, capital efficiency, customer experience and scalability. You care about building something that lasts.
   

  

 You are precise. You are structured. You are calm under uncertainty.
   

  

 You want responsibility.
   

  

 The Business Case
   

  

 We are building a studio that takes starting 51 % equity in each venture we create. We expect some % to fail. Some % to produce value.
   

  

 Your architecture determines whether that % becomes in failure or success .
   

  

 If SVOS works, we reduce burn, increase speed, and multiply output across every company. That is asymmetric leverage.
   

  

**You Receive**
* Equity as CTO co-founder trough vesting set-up
* Foundational role in the company
* Ownership in a portfolio model, not a single startup
* Direct influence on capital deployment and product strategy


 Salary will be modest in the first months. The goal is to close 12M SEK this year (2026) and build properly.
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

 We offer more than a job.
   

  

**We Offer**
* The chance to build companies from zero, repeatedly
* The freedom to architect without legacy constraints
* A studio model where tech is central, not supportive
* A long-term vision beyond trends


 We are building at the intersection of inner development, AI, culture and frontier thinking.
   

  

 You will grow as a builder. You will grow as a leader. You will shape how you want to live while building.
   

  

 This is not about chasing hype cycles. This is about designing how companies should operate in this new age of humanity.
   

  

 The Change
   

  

 Most developers optimize other people’s visions. Most CTOs inherit broken systems. Most talented builders never get to design from first principles.
   

  

 Here, you do.
   

  

 You step into a real adventure. Not chaos. Not fantasy. But the real work of building the infrastructure that future companies stand on.
   

  

 If you feel the pull to build something foundational, if you want ownership, risk and meaning instead of comfort, if you want to become a true builder,
   

  

 then this is your call.
   

  

 Spucce Venture.

title: Full-stack Developer, Industrial Risk Systems
description:
**Gillar du att utmanas och leverera tekniskt avancerade system med komplex affärslogik? Nu söker vi en fullstack-utvecklare som vill arbeta med Ifs risksystem för våra allra största kunder.**
**Om rollen**
 Som fullstack-utvecklare arbetar du med C#, Entity Framework, WPF, React och Azure för att leverera en modern backend med ASP.NET Core tillsammans med en högpresterande frontend. Du har högt fokus på kodkvalitet och strävar efter att levererar enligt moderna arkitekturmönster, som teamet gör idag.
   

  

 Du använder din analytiska och tekniska förmåga för att lösa avancerade problem samtidigt som du bidrar till vår resa mot webben och lär dig mycket nytt. Lärande är viktigt på If och därför erbjuder vi en uppsjö av möjligheter till lärande såsom tech-seminarier, kompetensdagar, digitalt lärande och mängder av interna utbildningar samt möjligheter till certifieringar.
   

  

 Inom IT Industrial Risk Systems är du med och utvecklar system som hjälper våra riskingenjörer att göra riskutvärderingar av våra allra största kunders anläggningar. Detta kan vara alltifrån en högteknologisk produktionsanläggning i en storstad i Sverige till en gruva för ett multinationellt bolag mitt ute i djungeln helt utan nätverksuppkoppling.
   

  

**Om teamet**
 Du är medlem i ett av IT Industrial Risk Systems tre agila utvecklingsteam. Varje team består av fyra till fem utvecklare och en QA-ingenjör som tillsammans arbetar som ett tvärfunktionellt agilt team. Teamen har ett nära samarbete med både produktägare och arkitekter för att säkerställa att vi levererar rätt saker på rätt sätt.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
* En inkluderande arbetsmiljö där alla är välkomna
* Karriär- och utvecklingsmöjligheter inom Nordens största försäkringsbolag
* Sociala aktiviteter, tillsammans med en högkvalitativ professionell miljö
* Möjlighet till hybridarbete
* Hälsosam arbetsplats med exempelvis friskvårdsbidrag, gym och olika idrottsaktiviteter
* Lunchbidrag
* Bra försäkringsförmåner
* Hög pension


**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som brinner för mjukvaruutveckling och vill leverera högkvalitativ kod. Du är självgående och är van vid att arbeta med feedback för att leverera bästa möjliga resultat. Du är bra på att kommunicera och samarbeta för att nå gemensamma mål. Du gillar att arbeta med tekniskt avancerade system och lösa komplex affärslogik på ett smart sätt.
   

  

**Du har också:**
* Universitetsutbildning inom ingenjör, systemutveckling, IT eller motsvarande
* Minst 3+ års erfarenhet av .NET-programvaruutveckling
* Goda kunskaper i C#, .NET Core / Entity Framework / MSSQL
* Erfarenheteter av Azure-plattformen
* Flytande engelska
* Goda kunskaper i svenska
* Kunskap om agila utvecklingsmetoder som Scrum


**Det är meriterande om du har (eller vill lära dig):**
* Goda kunskaper i React / WPF
* Erfarenhet av Azure DevOps pipelines och YAML
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code och Bicep templates
* Erfarenhet av Docker
* Azure-certifieringar
* Erfarenhet av att jobba med distribuerade system


**Mer information och rekryteringsprocessen**
**Sista ansökningsdag** 
 : Ansök då så snart som möjligt eftersom vi tillämpar löpande urval, dock senast 2026-02-09. För att ansöka vill vi att du bifogar ett CV. I nästa steg kommer du bli ombedd att besvara några frågor. Notera att vi inte tar emot ansökningar via mejl utan att du måste ansöka via vårt rekryteringsverktyg.
   

  

**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Plats:** 
 Bergshamra
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning
   

  

 För mer information om tjänsten vänligen kontakta Johan Waessman, rekryterande chef på johan.waessman@if.se
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: D365 F&O Technical Lead
description:
**Job Description:** 




 As the D365 F&O Technical Lead, you will be the primary authority on the technical health and architectural integrity of our ERP ecosystem. You will bridge the gap between functional requirements and technical execution, leading a global development team to deliver scalable, high-performance solutions. You aren't just overseeing code; you are defining the technical roadmap for a business-critical platform.
 








  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Architectural Leadership: Design end-to-end technical architectures for D365 F&O, ensuring alignment with best practices, scalability, and "Update Safe" development standards.
* Team Orchestration: Lead and mentor onshore and offshore development teams. You will be responsible for workload distribution, sprint planning, and technical troubleshooting & development.
* Quality Governance: Conduct rigorous code reviews and enforce strict development standards. Ensure that all extensions and customizations minimize technical debt and maintain upgrade compatibility.
* Integration Strategy: Design and oversee complex integrations between D365 and external systems (PLM, CRM, Banking, etc.) using Azure Integration Services, OData, and Custom Services.
* Environment & ALM Management: Own the Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) process, including build automation, Azure DevOps (CI/CD) pipelines, and environment promotion strategies.
* Strategic Advisory: Act as the technical point of escalation for stakeholders, providing clarity on complex design decisions, performance tuning, and the impact of Microsoft’s "One Version" updates.








  





**Key Skills & Qualifications** 



* Core Technical: Expert-level X++ development, C#, and deep understanding of the D365 F&O Metadata model and AOS.
* Integration: Proven experience with Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Service Bus, and Power Platform (Dataverse/Dual-write).
* Data & Reporting: Proficiency in Electronic Reporting (ER), BYOD, Azure Data Lake, and Power BI integration.
* DevOps: Mastery of Azure DevOps for version control, build definitions, and automated deployments.
* Soft Skills: Strong consultative mindset with the ability to translate "technical speak" into business value for C-suite stakeholders.








  





**Preferred Experience** 



* Experience: 5+ years in Dynamics AX/D365 F&O development, with at least 2 years in a Lead capacity.
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* Certification: Microsoft Certified: Dynamics 365: Finance and Operations Apps Solution Architect Expert (MB-700) or Developer (MB-300/500).



  





  





**Recruiter's Email : shikharsharma@thriveitsystems.com**
